'''Team SoroSuub''' was a [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racing]] team. It was presumably sponsored by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. As of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], it had become the second-highest-ranking swoop team.<ref name="Holonet News">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|54|sports/1352_1.html|Ominaz Keeps Top Ranking}}</ref> During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the team participated in the [[Cularin Classic]] swoop race on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]].<ref name="CaV">{{LivingForce|Jigsaw: Cloak and Vibroblade}}</ref>
